# AI Finance Ops

> AI Finance Ops is the financial intelligence copilot for SaaS founders. It automatically tracks MRR, ARR, churn, cash runway, LTV, and burn rate by connecting directly to Stripe — no spreadsheets, no manual work.

## Core Pages

- [Home](https://aifinanceops.app): Product overview, features, and onboarding CTA.
- [Features](https://aifinanceops.app/features): Full breakdown of automation features — Stripe sync, AI forecasting, KPI tracking, alerts.
- [Pricing](https://aifinanceops.app/pricing): Subscription plans for bootstrapped founders, growth-stage teams, and agencies.
- [Register](https://aifinanceops.app/register): Create a free account and connect Stripe.
- [Login](https://aifinanceops.app/login): Sign in to your AI Finance Ops dashboard.
- [About](https://aifinanceops.app/about): Company background, mission, and founding story.

## Free SaaS Finance Tools

- [Startup Runway Calculator](https://aifinanceops.app/runway-calculator): Calculate how many months of cash runway your startup has left. Formula: Cash Balance ÷ Monthly Net Burn.
- [MRR Tracker](https://aifinanceops.app/mrr-tracker): Track Monthly Recurring Revenue in real time from Stripe.
- [MRR Calculator](https://aifinanceops.app/mrr-calculator): Calculate MRR from your subscription plans.
- [ARR Calculator](https://aifinanceops.app/arr-calculator): Convert MRR to Annual Recurring Revenue.
- [Churn Rate Calculator](https://aifinanceops.app/churn-rate-calculator): Calculate and benchmark your SaaS churn rate.
- [LTV Calculator](https://aifinanceops.app/ltv-calculator): Calculate Customer Lifetime Value (LTV) and LTV:CAC ratio.
- [Cash Flow Tracker](https://aifinanceops.app/cash-flow-tracker): Monitor cash inflows and outflows with AI-generated forecasts.

## Key Concepts

**MRR (Monthly Recurring Revenue)**: Total predictable monthly subscription revenue. Core SaaS health metric.

**ARR (Annual Recurring Revenue)**: MRR × 12. Used for annual contracts and investor reporting.

**Churn Rate**: Percentage of customers or revenue lost in a given period. Net Revenue Retention (NRR) is the inverse metric.

**Cash Runway**: Months of operating cash remaining = Cash Balance ÷ Monthly Net Burn. Healthy SaaS target: 12–18 months.

**LTV (Customer Lifetime Value)**: Total expected revenue from one customer = ARPU ÷ Monthly Churn Rate.

**Burn Rate**: Monthly cash spend. Net burn = gross expenses minus revenue.
